{{Infobox group
| name = Endross Travelers
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Endross]] [[Travelers]] are a group of individuals associated with the territory of [[Endross]]. They are characterized by their ability to summon and manipulate powerful elemental forces, specifically white lightning bolts and massive storm-like [[Gates]]. These [[Gates]] can grow to a size capable of swallowing large animals or shrouding entire hallways in dark clouds and lightning. While some descriptions suggest their methods are unsophisticated, primarily focusing on targeting enemies with elemental attacks, they have historically played a role in maintaining their territories by managing wild elements and overseeing infrastructure like roads and waystations. However, they have also been noted for becoming overly aggressive. The group is associated with the [[Endross Incarnation]], a being that manifests as a destructive natural disaster. The [[Travelers]] utilize [[Gates]] to move between territories, allowing them to travel back to their own lands or follow others through various portals.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Endross Travelers]] use stormy [[Gates]] that release lightning.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Endross Travelers]] send white lightning bolts.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Endross Travelers]] can create storms with black clouds and flashing lightning.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Endross Travelers]] can swarm with a flock of little flying lizards that crackle with blue sparks.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Endross Travelers]] are travelers that [[Naraka]] [[Travelers]] run with.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
